title: Premium Enchantment Glint
description: In this TP your item and entity enchantment glint becomes white from purple :)
body:
In This TP, The Entity and item glint becomes white from Purple that feels premuim.
Thats why i named this TP (Premuim Enchanted Glint)  :)

BTW, there is also my youtube channel and Discord Server. So if you want any other version of my any creation. Then just join and talk with me.

And SUBSCIBE MY CHANNEL pls.  :)
